name: Sync Meter

releases.author: wolfuardian
releases.description:
## Initial Release

Show real-time sync progress percentage in the status bar.

### Features
- Sync progress percentage with mini progress bar
- Three visual states: syncing, synced, unavailable
- Automatic polling every 2 seconds
- Desktop and mobile support
